summary: Multi-provider env template: MiniMax (Anthropic-compatible direct), OpenAI (via LiteLLM proxy), DeepSeek (via LiteLLM proxy), OpenRouter (direct), Azure OpenAI (Codex). Common settings: DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1, CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC=1. Uses ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN, ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, ANTHROPIC_MODEL, ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL, ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL, ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL pattern for all providers.
